---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for FlowLens
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case that is not
currently supported.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have evaluated and why you prefer this solution.

## Impact assessment

- **Who benefits?**  e.g. SDK users, server operators, dashboard viewers
- **Breaking change?**  Yes / No
- **Effort estimate:**  Small / Medium / Large

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art, or any other information that helps illustrate
the request.
